channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped concrete, 15th July
item.description:
This is a hazard and prevents people from parking

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worbeck Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 15th July
item.description:
Dumped branches

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary traffic lights not working, 15th July
item.description:
Temporary traffic lights on maiden lane for under the railway bridge have stopped working. This is causing significant traffic with Crayford Road currently closed and needs addressing immediately before rush hour and everywhere backs up even more as cars keep forcing their way through. Could not report under traffic lights as there was not a yellow dot to select the lights as they are not permanent so reporting through this route.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maiden Lane, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ambiguous Roadworks Signage, 15th July
item.description:
This was seen on 7 July 26, but something should be learnt from this: Road signs indicated "road ahead closed", on Shaftsbury Ave, southbound near 7 dials. Yet, the road ahead was never closed, leading to more traffic by confused drivers. Such a lack of clarity is not at a very good standard. Signs should have clearly indicated that the road to the left (7 Dials itself) was closed but the road ahead was not.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 189, Shaftesbury Avenue, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken large mirror fly tipped on pavement, 15th July
item.description:
This is my second report today regarding fly tipping due to the neglect of the streets in this postcode. This fly tip is dangerous because it is shards of broken glass. Because the streets haven't been swept or weeded for many months, people are dumping their rubbish here as the whole area looks uncared for. Please authorise street cleansing to complete a thorough tidy up of Harraden Road and the neighbouring streets, thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Begbie Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Severely Rutted Road Requiring Urgent Repair, 15th July
item.description:
The road surface has deteriorated significantly over the past few months and is now severely rutted, with the wheel tracks having subsided and a raised ridge forming down the centre. This is causing vehicles to scrape their undercarriages when passing along the road, creating a risk of damage and presenting a clear safety concern as oil has leaked from damaged undercarriages.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Radbourne Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa dumped on yester road today 15/7/26, 15th July
item.description:
It is blocking the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yester Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside the stage door entrance to the theatre. On the corner of Shelton Street into Mercer Street., 15th July
item.description:
The pavement tiles have become out of alignment therefore creating a dip. Causing trip hazards. We noticed this issue appeared over the weekend of Saturday 11th July.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16-18, Shelton Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kitchen extractor fan fly tipped on pavement, 15th July
item.description:
The roads have not been swept or weeded for a long time (many months), The local area looks extrmely untidy and this is encouraging flytipping as the whole locality looks uncared for.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Begbie Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cement spillage in road, 15th July
item.description:
Cement mixer spilt large amount of cement for a considerable distance. It was red but didnt get number. Some cars have skidded on it, all cars make a lot of noise over it and very likely damaged tyres. Needs removing before it sets and makes road surface dangerous particularly for cyclists etc
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lakedale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Japanese knotweed growing in alley between whitely road and durning road alleyway is near the 7th day Adventist hall, 15th July
item.description:
See above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Georgetown Close, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car Battery outside, 15th July
item.description:
Good afternoon, There is a car battery outside on the grass. The neighbour changed 2 days ago and forgot it outside. Please remove it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Burnham Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roadwork barriers still in place, 15th July
item.description:
The tarmac has been repaired but no one has removed the roadwork barriers. Signage says works from 24-06 until 26-06. I have attempted to report it to Conway contractors
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Liverpool Grove, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattresses dumped on side of pavement, 15th July
item.description:
These mattresses have been sitting on the street for weeks now and show no sign of moving.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marlborough Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A large plastic wheelie bin and a single mattress has been dumped between the two lampposts as shown in the photograph in Kemnal road, 15th July
item.description:
A large plastic wheelie bin and single mattress has been dumped on the pavement between the two lampposts as shown in the photograph in Kemnal road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kemnal Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 46 Winchester Ave, 15th July
item.description:
Blue bag

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winchester Avenue, Kilburn, London

item.title: Mattress dumped, 15th July
item.description:
A mattress has been dumped/left on our practice drive way near our clinical bins.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Castleton Road, Mottingham, Greater London

item.title: Front of College Mansions, 15th July
item.description:
Tubes left behind. Neighbour who moved arranged rubbish collection but this was left behind

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salusbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Corner highgate road & st albans road. At C11 bus stop, 15th July
item.description:
Manhole is rocking, very noisy all night with 24h busses going over it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highgate Road, Dartmouth Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wilderton Road N16 Needs cleaning properly, 15th July
item.description:
Wilderton road needs cleaning properly from top to bottom around tree bases pavement and gutters.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wilderton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
